theme.name: ExamAce Nepal UI
theme.archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) with Notion structural inspiration
theme.description: A mix of Duolingo's tactile, colorful gamification and Notion's clean, block-based structural minimalism. Designed to feel like a high-end mobile app.
theme.emotion: Encouraging, structured, rewarding, and highly engaging.

buttons.primary: bg-[#38BDF8] text-white rounded-2xl border-b-4 border-[#0284C7] active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-all px-6 py-4 font-bold text-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-[#4ADE80] text-white rounded-2xl border-b-4 border-[#16A34A] active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-all px-6 py-4 font-bold text-lg
buttons.outline: bg-white text-slate-700 rounded-2xl border-2 border-slate-200 border-b-4 active:border-b-2 active:translate-y-[2px] transition-all px-6 py-4 font-bold text-lg

cards.base: bg-white border-2 border-slate-100 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm
cards.interactive: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:border-[#38BDF8] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.base: bg-slate-50 border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-2xl focus:border-[#38BDF8] focus:bg-white focus:ring-4 focus:ring-sky-100 transition-all px-5 py-4 text-base font-medium text-slate-900 w-full

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-slate-50 relative pb-24 shadow-2xl

components_design.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto bg-white border-t-2 border-slate-100 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center z-50 rounded-t-[32px] shadow-[0_-8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]
components_design.progress_bar: h-5 w-full bg-slate-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden border border-slate-200. Inner: h-full bg-[#4ADE80] rounded-full transition-all duration-500
components_design.streak_badge: flex items-center gap-2 bg-orange-50 border-2 border-orange-200 text-amber-600 rounded-2xl px-4 py-2 font-black text-sm
components_design.ai_chat_bubble_ai: bg-green-50 border-2 border-green-100 text-slate-800 rounded-3xl rounded-tl-sm p-5 shadow-sm font-medium
components_design.ai_chat_bubble_user: bg-[#38BDF8] text-white rounded-3xl rounded-tr-sm p-5 shadow-sm font-medium
components_design.mcq_option: w-full text-left bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 border-b-4 rounded-2xl p-4 font-semibold text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 active:border-b-2 active:translate-y-[2px] transition-all mb-3
components_design.mcq_option_selected: w-full text-left bg-sky-50 border-2 border-[#38BDF8] border-b-4 rounded-2xl p-4 font-semibold text-sky-700 mb-3

icons.instructions: Use with strokeWidth={2.5} for a chunkier, more playful look. Size 28px for bottom nav, 20px-24px for inline icons.

image_urls.description: 3D stack of books with glowing lightbulb in light blue/green
3D glowing golden flame for daily streak
3D graduation cap on smartphone with confetti

testing.guidelines: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'dashboard-streak-counter', 'mcq-option-a').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI using React and Tailwind. To simulate the mobile app experience on web, constrain the main layout to a mobile width (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto).
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override their styles using the tactile/Duolingo-inspired classes provided in 'surfaces_and_effects'. Remove default Shadcn rigid borders/shadows.
Implement the bottom navigation bar so it remains permanently fixed at the bottom of the screen (on mobile sizes).
Import Nunito and Figtree fonts from Google Fonts and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
For the MCQ Practice, use the tactile button styles for options. They should feel very satisfying to tap.
Strictly use the provided image URLs. Do not insert placeholders.
Ensure generous spacing (p-6, gap-8) as per the Notion inspiration to keep the UI from feeling cluttered despite the vibrant colors.
